title: Jumping to newest reply on a board automatically?
excerpt:
Hi there, 
Is there a way to automatically jump to the most recent post on a board? For example, if a colleague of mine comments on a board I created, instead of me manually having to scroll all the way to the bottom for…

posts.author: mt.ittechnician (Alex Vallance)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Is there a way to automatically jump to the most recent post on a board? For example, if a colleague of mine comments on a board I created, instead of me manually having to scroll all the way to the bottom for the most recent post, is there a way this can be done automatically?

Thanks!

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @mt.ittechnician - Are you referring to updates in the Inbox section or inside a board?
